titles.title: I've Got a Mansion Just Over the Hilltop

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm satisfied with just a cottage below A little silver and a little gold But in that city where the ransomed will shine I want a gold one that's silver lined.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've got a mansion just over the hilltop In that bright land where we'll never grow old And someday yonder we will never more wander But walk on streets that are purest gold.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Don't think me poor or deserted or lonely I'm not discouraged I'm heaven bound I'm but a pilgrim in search of the city I want a mansion, a harp and a crown.
